results.command: PORT=6427; LOG=artifacts/optimization/cod-pass41-postkeep/postkeep-server-$PORT-$$.log; target-cod-pass41-postkeep/release/frankenredis --bind 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT >"$LOG" 2>&1 & PID=$!; trap "kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true; wait $PID 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; sleep 0.2; target-cod-pass41-postkeep/release/fr-bench --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --clients 50 --requests 300000 --pipeline 16 --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --workload set --key-prefix pass41post >/dev/null; kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true; wait $PID 2>/dev/null || true; true
